quotations.commercial_conditions:
Quotation Validity: This quotation is valid for 30 calendar days from the date of issue.
Scope of Work: The quotation covers only the deliverables specifically listed in this proposal. Any additional work requested by the Client shall be treated as a variation and quoted separately.
Payment Terms: Payments shall be made according to the agreed milestone schedule. All invoices are payable within 15 calendar days from the invoice date.
Project Commencement: Work will commence only after receipt of the agreed advance payment (where applicable) and all required technical inputs from the Client.
Engineering Inputs: The Client shall provide all necessary drawings, specifications, design criteria, operational data, and approvals required to execute the work.
Design Reviews: Up to two (2) design review/revision cycles are included. Additional revisions arising from changes in scope or Client requirements will be billed at the agreed hourly rate.
Software & QA/QC: Professional engineering software costs, internal quality assurance (QA/QC), and document checking are included in this quotation.
Travel & Site Visits: Travel, accommodation, visa expenses, inspections, surveys, statutory fees, and third-party costs are excluded unless specifically stated.
Taxes: Applicable taxes, duties, withholding taxes, or government levies shall be borne by the Client unless otherwise agreed in writing.
Intellectual Property: All engineering calculations, models, drawings, reports, spreadsheets, and digital files remain the intellectual property of Primelisometrics Consultancy until full payment has been received.
Confidentiality: Both parties shall maintain confidentiality of all technical and commercial information exchanged during the project.
Suspension of Services: The Consultant reserves the right to suspend work on overdue invoices exceeding 30 calendar days without liability for schedule impacts.
Client Delays: Delays caused by late information, approvals, or decisions from the Client may require adjustment of the project schedule and delivery dates.
Liability: The Consultant's total liability arising from the services provided shall be limited to the value of the fees paid under this quotation.
Currency & Banking Charges: All payments shall be made in the agreed currency. Any international bank transfer charges shall be borne by the Client.
Acceptance: Confirmation of this quotation by Purchase Order, signed acceptance, or written email approval shall constitute acceptance of these commercial conditions.

1. Offer Validity: This quotation is valid for 30 calendar days.
2. Intellectual Property: Native models remain Primelisometrics property until final milestone payment clearance.
3. Delay Fees: Payments delayed beyond 14 days incur a 1.5% weekly delay fee.
4. Revision Policy: Includes up to 2 major design iterations/reviews. Additional iterations charged hourly.
